chunks.text: Announcement: Besties are hosting The All-In Holiday Spectacular in San Francisco on December 7th! Get tickets: https://allin.com/events
Macro and markets: making sense of unique asset diversions
Reallocating assets for a new period of constraints
Election update: Data leans Trump as we enter the home stretch

Is Starbucks fixable? Or has it hit market saturation?
